name: connect-four
description: Connect Four - Classic strategy game with AI opponent

scripts.build: npm run generate:sw && npm run build:wasm-assets && next build --webpack
scripts.build:cf: npm run generate:sw && npm run build:wasm-assets && npx @opennextjs/cloudflare build
scripts.build:wasm: cd worker/rust_ai_core && wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir ../../public/wasm --features wasm
scripts.build:wasm-assets: npm run build:wasm && mkdir -p public/ml/data/genetic_params && cp ml/data/genetic_params/evolved.json public/ml/data/genetic_params/ && mkdir -p public/ml/data/weights && python3 scripts/convert_model_for_wasm.py ml/data/weights/simple_model.json public/ml/data/weights/ml_ai_weights_simple.json && cp worker/rust_ai_core/ml/data/weights/ml_ai_weights_distilled.json public/ml/data/weights/ml_ai_weights_best.json
scripts.nuke: rm -rf .next .open-next .wrangler node_modules package-lock.json && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.check: npm run type-check && (cd worker/rust_ai_core && NUM_GAMES=4 cargo test test_ai_matrix -- --nocapture) && npm run test:coverage && npm run test:e2e
scripts.check:slow: npm run lint && npm run type-check && (cd worker/rust_ai_core && RUN_SLOW_TESTS=1 cargo test --features slow_tests -- --nocapture) && npm run test:coverage && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:rust:slow: cd worker/rust_ai_core && RUN_SLOW_TESTS=1 cargo test --features slow_tests -- --nocapture
scripts.test:ml-v2: echo 'ML tests disabled - no models trained yet. Run: npm run train'
scripts.test:ml-hybrid: echo 'ML tests disabled - no models trained yet. Run: npm run train'
scripts.evolve:genetic-params: cd worker/rust_ai_core && caffeinate cargo run --release --bin evolve_params
scripts.validate:genetic-params: cd worker/rust_ai_core && caffeinate cargo test test_genetic_params_comparison -- --nocapture
scripts.test:ai-matrix:md: cd worker/rust_ai_core && cargo test test_ai_matrix -- --nocapture | node ../../scripts/format-ai-matrix-md.cjs
